text.title: ImagePipeline and PromptTemplates
text.summary: ImagePipeline for variant sets and A/B generation; PromptTemplates static methods for common use cases.

section.title: ImagePipeline
section.p: ImagePipeline builds on ImageGenerationService to generate style-by-size variant matrices and A/B test image sets. For A/B tests, generate all variants before surfacing any to avoid partial-set delivery.

section.title: PromptTemplates
section.reference: PromptTemplates static methods: product_photo, logo, social_media, ui_mockup
section.p: PromptTemplates provides static methods for common image use cases. Use these as the single source of truth for prompt construction — avoid ad-hoc prompt strings in pipeline code.
section.reference: Download generated image and upload to S3 to resolve URL expiry

rule.statement: Use next(iter(output)) instead of output[0] when consuming Replicate Flux-schnell results.
rule.rationale: Replicate flux-schnell returns an iterator object, not a list. output[0] raises TypeError — the correct access pattern is next(iter(output)).
